headline: All six crew members killed in KC-135 refueling plane crash in Iraq, U.S. military says
summary: The KC-135 is used to refuel other aircraft in mid-air. This is the fourth reported aircraft loss since the Iran war started.

headline: General Dynamics Corporation (GD) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.59 Per Share
summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is among the 10 Best Aerospace Dividend Stocks to Buy. headline: Munitions Burned in 100 Hours Could Fuel RTX’s Next Growth Wave
summary: A $268 billion backlog sounds like a guaranteed growth story. For RTX, it is more complicated than that, because converting those orders into cash depends on resolving an engine crisis that has already forced Airbus to cut production targets. RTX Corp (NYSE:RTX) is sitting on a record $268 billion backlog as of Q4 2025, up ... Munitions Burned in 100 Hours Could Fuel RTX’s Next Growth Wave
